text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm working as usual when Super Creek excitedly
places a flyer on my desk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's for a free one-day pottery class.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They're holding an event at the art museum. It
looks like you get to make your own bowls and
teacups.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it sound like a lot of fun? Why don't you
come with me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Great! Since I don't have anything else to do
today, let's get going! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What are you thinking of making?
choice_data_list: Maybe something we can use for training?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Gosh! Hehe, I wonder if you can really make
something like that out of clay...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've always got training on your mind, haven't
you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I absolutely adore how dedicated you are.
choice_data_list: What are you going to make?
What are you going to make?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, good question. A teacup or a vase might
be nice...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But you have to carefully consider the thickness
of things like teacups, or they might end up being
too heavy to use...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And vases are big, so you have to take your time
or you might ruin them.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Which do you think is better?
choice_data_list:
A vase would make for great interior
decoration.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Then a teacup it is!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I hope I do a good job! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try my hand at pottery with Super Creek. We
can't come up with anything that would be useful
for training, so we both end up making teacups.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was pretty hard work, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Having a knack for it is important, but making
pottery actually uses more brain power than I
expected.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It won't turn out the way you want it to if you let
your mind wander.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But watching it slowly take shape, a deep feeling
of attachment grew inside me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: As if it were my own child.
choice_data_list:
I can't wait to see how they turn out once
they've been fired in the kiln.

I can't wait to see how they turn out once
they've been fired in the kiln.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Me neither! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would you like to exchange teacups once
they're done?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I actually made a wish on my teacup while I was
making it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wished for all the tea you drink out of it to be
delicious and relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was. You're always working hard, so I wanted to
give you some comfort.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'll always be here to make you feel better
with more than just a cup of tea! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Super Creek and I enjoy some
tea after exchanging our teacups.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's learned something valuable
from the pottery class.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It will be difficult, but trying hard is an experience
in and of itself!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's keep giving it our all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try my hand at pottery with Super Creek. We
can't come up with anything that would be useful
for training, so we both end up making vases.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Great job. Did you enjoy yourself?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It sure was. I loved watching how focused you
were. So cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But the whole process involved more detail and
patience than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't just about gently pressing the clay with
your hands. There was a lot more to it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I think it was a truly valuable experience.
choice_data_list: I can't wait for them to be fired in the kiln.
I can't wait for them to be fired in the kiln.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Me neither! We should go find some flowers to
put in them once they're done.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It would be lovely to decorate our own rooms
with the same flowers.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That way, we'll think of today whenever we look
at them and remember the fun we had! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Super Creek and I head out to
look for flowers to put in our finished vases.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's learned something valuable
from the pottery class.
